description: AI/ML anomaly detection dashboard — independent of rule-based detection. Powered by the worker-ai-ml container (Isolation Forest + Local Outlier Factor ensemble). Thresholds are data-driven, not rule-based.

dashboards.name: Anomalies with AI Detection
dashboards.description: Pure ML anomaly detection via Isolation Forest + Local Outlier Factor ensemble. All thresholds (WARNING/CRITICAL) are derived from the training-set score distribution (P75/P90), with no hardcoded business rules.

cards.name: AI Ensemble Score Over Time
cards.sql: SELECT data_timestamp AS ts, ensemble_score::double precision AS ensemble_score FROM ai_anomaly_results ORDER BY data_timestamp ASC LIMIT 5000

cards.name: Alert Level Distribution (AI)
cards.sql: SELECT alert_level, COUNT(*)::int AS total FROM ai_anomaly_results GROUP BY alert_level ORDER BY total DESC

cards.name: Anomalies by Hour of Day (AI)
cards.sql: SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM data_timestamp)::int AS hour_of_day, COUNT(*)::int AS anomaly_count FROM ai_anomaly_results WHERE is_anomaly = true GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

cards.name: Ensemble Score Distribution (AI)
cards.sql: SELECT width_bucket(ensemble_score::numeric, 0::numeric, 1::numeric, 20) AS bucket, COUNT(*)::int AS cnt FROM ai_anomaly_results GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket

cards.name: Recent AI-Detected Anomalies
cards.sql: SELECT id, data_timestamp, round(ensemble_score::numeric, 3) AS ensemble_score, round(if_score::numeric, 3) AS if_score, round(lof_score::numeric, 3) AS lof_score, alert_level, model_version, feature_snapshot FROM ai_anomaly_results WHERE is_anomaly = true ORDER BY data_timestamp DESC LIMIT 50

cards.name: Total Rows Evaluated (AI)
cards.sql: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total_evaluated FROM ai_anomaly_results

cards.name: Total Anomalies Detected (AI)
cards.sql: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total_anomalies FROM ai_anomaly_results WHERE is_anomaly = true

cards.name: Critical Anomalies (AI)
cards.sql: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS critical_count FROM ai_anomaly_results WHERE alert_level = 'CRITICAL'

cards.name: Model Training History
cards.sql: SELECT model_version, num_training_samples, COUNT(*)::int AS rows_evaluated, round(AVG(ensemble_score)::numeric, 4) AS avg_score, round(MAX(ensemble_score)::numeric, 4) AS max_score, MAX(detected_at) AS last_run FROM ai_anomaly_results GROUP BY model_version, num_training_samples ORDER BY last_run DESC LIMIT 10
